events.text: Goal! Tunisia 0, Japan 1. Daichi Kamada (Japan) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Keito Nakamura.
Goal! Tunisia 0, Japan 2. Ayase Ueda (Japan) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ko Itakura following a fast break.
Substitution, Tunisia. Ismaël Gharbi replaces Elias Saad.
Substitution, Tunisia. Mohamed Amine Ben Hmida replaces Dylan Bronn.
Substitution, Tunisia. Firas Chaouat replaces Sebastian Tounekti.
Goal! Tunisia 0, Japan 3. Junya Ito (Japan) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ayase Ueda with a through ball.
Substitution, Japan. Junnosuke Suzuki replaces Daichi Kamada.
Substitution, Japan. Yukinari Sugawara replaces Ritsu Doan.
Substitution, Japan. Yuito Suzuki replaces Keito Nakamura.
Substitution, Japan. Ayumu Seko replaces Takehiro Tomiyasu.
Goal! Tunisia 0, Japan 4. Ayase Ueda (Japan) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Kaishu Sano with a cross.
Substitution, Japan. Keisuke Goto replaces Ayase Ueda.
Substitution, Tunisia. Rani Khedira replaces Ellyes Skhiri.
Substitution, Tunisia. Elias Achouri replaces Ali Abdi.
